title: Parents
questions: What are the names of your parents? Where and when were they born? What did they look like?
What were the circumstances behind their courtship and marriage?
What did they do for a living?
Did you ever visit them or help them at work? What were they like?
What did you get or inherit from them?
Are there any special family heirlooms?
Did any of your relatives fight in World War I or World War II?
Who were the black sheep of the family?
Were there any famous or infamous relatives?
